title: Forms+
description: A tool focused on building and designing MCBE forms with better structure, cleaner developer experience, and stronger presentation.

title: Portfolio Site
description: A multi-page personal portfolio focused on stronger layout, theme customization, responsive behavior, accessibility improvements, and polished presentation.

title: EasyMusic
description: A simple way to listen to your favorite music, artist, podcasts, audio book, etc.

title: Cord Hider
description: A simple way to hide your coordinates from being displayed on your screen. Useful for streamers and content creators to hide their personal base coords.

title: Item Manager
description: A simple system to add triggers to items. If a user triggers a trigger with an item, a set line of commands will run.

title: More Work Coming
description: I'm still building and improving. This portfolio will grow as I add stronger software, cleaner systems, and better project case studies.
